name: playground-tree
description: Switch to the Tree scenario (depth 4, branching 3 → 121 nodes, 120 edges, perfect tree). The force layout should fan it into a roughly radial / hierarchical structure with the root central.

setup.vlmDescription: Debug Playground overlay with the 'Tree' pill highlighted. The Depth parameter reads 4, Branching reads 3. The viewport shows ~121 nodes in a tree topology — one root, three children, nine grandchildren, twenty-seven great-grandchildren, eighty-one leaves. Force-directed layout typically arranges trees as either a radial 'sunburst' or a fanned-out branch pattern. No cycles visible.
